findings.message: ItemRead is the external API response schema (used by both GET /items and POST /items). Adding owner_email here echoes the owner's email address — explicitly annotated as PII that must NOT be included in external responses (see models.py: 'PII: owner email address — do not include in logs or external responses.') — back to every API client. This exposes PII in external responses against the documented policy.
findings.suggestion: Drop owner_email from ItemRead so the email is never serialized to clients. If a contact must be surfaced, return a masked/redacted value or expose it only through a separate authorized/admin schema.
